strengths.heading: What is a working preference?
strengths.description: Your working preferences tell you about how you chose to operate in the work space. It shows aspects that encompass people / tasks/ communication style / decision making among others.

strengths.heading: Why is it important?
strengths.description: It is a window into your behaviour patterns that are understandable. It is also a mirror of how people see you.

strengths.heading: How does it help you?
strengths.description: You can anchor yourself in situations knowing what you are good at. You can seek to develop areas that you may need for specific situations.

aspirations.heading: What motivates you?
aspirations.description: This defines the aspects that you want to get and achieve by way of either success or a progression in anything that you do. These seek to identify your core motivations in doing any job / task that comes your way or is a part of your work.

aspirations.heading: Why is it important
aspirations.description: Motivations remain our most powerful reason to achieve any outcome. These motivations drive our thinking and desire to work hard and deliver results.

aspirations.heading: How does it help you?
aspirations.description: Knowing why you want to succeed is important and you will have a clear idea of what drives you. You can gauge if you are in an enabling environment that meets your aspirations.
